# Job Seek — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org/

> Job Seek is a company-tracking tool for job seekers who already know where they want to work. It monitors career pages directly from thousands of companies — no third-party aggregators — so postings appear within hours of going live. Build watchlists of the companies you care about, get email alerts when roles open up, and track applications in one place. Multi-dimensional filters (seniority, tech stack, salary, location, language) when you want to narrow further.

## Key Facts

- Built around per-company watchlists and email alerts — designed for users who know their target companies, not broad "find any job" searches
- Indexes thousands of company career pages directly — no recruiter spam, no reposted ghost jobs
- Re-indexed frequently for freshness — postings appear within hours, typically before LinkedIn/Indeed cross-post
- Millions of postings tracked over time
- 4 languages: English, German, French, Italian
- Free tier: full search, 1 watchlist, application tracker
- Pro tier ($10/month): unlimited watchlists, email alerts
- Open-source crawler (MIT), job data (CC BY-NC 4.0)
- Built by Colophon Group, a small developer studio in Switzerland

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://jseek.co) — Product overview, features, and pricing
- [Explore Jobs](https://jseek.co/en/explore) — Search and filter job postings across all indexed companies
- [About](https://jseek.co/en/about) — Who built Job Seek, how it works, and our philosophy
- [FAQ](https://jseek.co/en/faq) — Frequently asked questions about pricing, crawling, privacy, and more
- [How We Index](https://jseek.co/en/how-we-index) — Crawling policy, rate limits, opt-out, and data handling
- [License](https://jseek.co/en/license) — Application code is MIT; job data is CC BY-NC 4.0
- [Privacy Policy](https://jseek.co/en/privacy-policy) — What data we collect and your GDPR rights
- [Terms of Service](https://jseek.co/en/terms) — Usage terms and conditions
